scripts.build: npx remotion render src/index.tsx MaukaMaukaDecoded out/video.mp4
scripts.build-with-audio: npx remotion render src/index.tsx MaukaMaukaDecoded out/video-silent.mp4 && ffmpeg -y -i out/video-silent.mp4 -i public/narration-v6-eleven.mp3 -i public/music.mp3 -filter_complex "[1:a]volume=1.0[a1];[2:a]volume=0.08[a2];[a1][a2]amix=inputs=2:duration=first[a]" -map 0:v -map "[a]" -c:v copy -c:a aac -shortest out/video.mp4
